docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHANSEN-ASHCROFT, CAROLINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIRKLAND, BAILEY $1,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,330.00, INCLUDED IN THIS JUDGMENT ARE STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $500.00 DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5(E) IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF MICHAEL W. COLLINS RE: LOST WRIT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHANSEN-ASHCROFT, CAROLINE
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY COLLINS, MICHAEL W
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT KIRKLAND, BAILEY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2016 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF FIRM MAILING ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY COLLINS, MICHAEL W
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHANSEN-ASHCROFT, CAROLINE AS TO DEFENDANT KIRKLAND, BAILEY
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $709.09 ACCRUED INTEREST, $395.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT KIRKLAND, BAILEY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE: $0.00 SERVED OCT-22-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KIRKLAND, BAILEY
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $568.80 INTEREST, $75.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHANSEN-ASHCROFT, CAROLINE
DECLARATION OF MICHAEL W. COLLINS: RE:ELECTRIC WRIT DECLARATION PER CCP 687.010 FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHANSEN-ASHCROFT, CAROLINE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY JOHANSEN-ASHCROFT, CAROLINE AS TO DEFENDANT KIRKLAND, BAILEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-15-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CAROLINE JOHANSEN-ASHCROFT. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT BAILEY KIRKLAND. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED TODAY, 11/15/16. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $499.21 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT KIRKLAND, BAILEY
